{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Aethril eyes
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Aethril eyes]] allow the user to see the flow of the [[Aether]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c40">''The Pilot'', chapter 40</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
